panels.text: Three days had passed since the encounter with the beast.

panels.speaker: Kaito
panels.text: The elder said the seal is deep underground.

panels.speaker: Yuki
panels.text: Underground? You mean the old mines?

panels.speaker: Kaito
panels.text: Yeah. No one has gone down there in years.
危険禁止区域

panels.speaker: Yuki
panels.text: Kaito, that sign... it says 立入禁止.

panels.speaker: Kaito
panels.text: I know what it says. We're going anyway.
RUMBLE

panels.speaker: Yuki
panels.text: The ground is shaking!

panels.speaker: Kaito
panels.text: Stay close. We must proceed with utmost caution and deliberation, my dear companion.
The darkness swallowed them whole.

panels.speaker: Yuki
panels.text: I can't see anything. Where are you?

panels.speaker: Kaito
panels.text: Right here. Don't let go of my hand.
SCREECH

panels.speaker: Yuki
panels.text: What was that?!

panels.speaker: Kaito
panels.text: Lol no idea but it sounded pretty funny actually.
A faint glow appeared ahead.

panels.speaker: Kaito
panels.text: There! The seal chamber!

panels.speaker: Yuki
panels.text: It's beautiful... and terrifying.

panels.speaker: Kaito
panels.text: This is what the old man talked about. The ancient barrier.
